commerceProducts.title: Destination Highlight: Wilderness Exploration and Crab Feast

promotion.title: CEL Shorex Evergreen Destination Highlights 60-79% booked

commerceProducts.description: Go ashore at the historic George Inlet Lodge for an all-out Alaskan crab feast. Chart a course for majestic beauty, outdoor adventure, and an incredible meal in the Alaskan wilds. Begin with a coastal drive that passes historic saw mills, waterfalls, and Native Alaskan totem poles. Board a sightseeing vessel and glide in the shadows of snow-capped mountains. View the Mahoney Glacial Cirque and 2,000-foot waterfalls. Keep watch for seals and otters playing in their natural habitat. As the Captain pulls up to the first crab pot, get ready to lend a hand. Join the crew and help haul in the soaked pots to see if there are Dungeness beauties within. After checking the pots, make way to the historic George Inlet Lodge for an authentic Alaskan crab feast. Savor the day’s catch, served with clarified butter and salad with Asian-style dressing. Be sure to leave room for dessert – cheesecake drenched in Alaskan blueberries. During Lunch, try your luck in a customary shell stacking contest. May the best stacker win.
highlights: Cruise by snow capped mountains and keep watch for seals, otters and other wildlife.
Give the crew a hand in pulling the crab pots to see if the day proves to be a lucky one.
Go ashore at the historic George Inlet Lodge for an all-out Alaskan crab feast.
Important details and advisements
Tour may run in reverse order
Tour may run in reverse. There are alternative meal options available for those that do not like crab.

bald eagle in flight.

commerceProducts.title: Small Group: Scenic River Float through Bald Eagle Preserve
commerceProducts.description: Discover the natural wonders and majestic wildlife of Alaska on a rafting exploration that glides you through the Chilkat Bald Eagle Preserve. Your expedition begins aboard a jet-powered catamaran that will take you through the waterways of Lynn Fjord to the town of Haines. A short, but panoramic, drive down the National Scenic Byway leads to the launch point for your river rafting journey. After a quick safety briefing, climb into an 18-foot inflatable raft and set off down the Chilkat River. Glide through the protected wilderness and keep watch for the park's famed birds of prey soaring overhead. You might also spot moose, or even bear roaming the riverbanks. Go ashore for a simple lunch and homemade cookies enjoyed against the most majestic backdrop imaginable. Follow the river’s edge back to Haines before the brisk catamaran ride back to Skagway.
highlights: Witness the majesty of Alaska on an expedition that travels by land, by sea, and by river.
Board a jet-powered catamaran and cruise through Lynn Fjord to the town of Haines, Alaska.
Board an 18-foot rubber raft for a guided journey down the Chilkat River and into its Bald Eagle preserve.

commerceProducts.title: Taku Lodge Feast and 5-Glacier Seaplane Discovery
commerceProducts.description: Embark on an excursion, that takes to the air on a flightseeing tour and touches down for an authentic Alaskan feast. Climb into a seaplane and skid across the water before lifting off into the skies above Juneau. Every guest enjoys a window seat as you fly over five of Alaska’s most spectacular glaciers. You’ll also soar above the wilderness where you might spot black bear and other wildlife, commentary through your headset. Your flight concludes with an exhilarating water landing at Taku Glacier Lodge, the only place in Juneau where you can dine to majestic glacial views. Savor a feast of fresh Wild Alaskan Salmon (or chicken, if preferred) paired with a selection of side dishes made from the bounty of Alaska.
highlights: Gaze out of our window seat as your seaplane pilot flies over five spectacular glaciers.
Enjoy an exhilarating water landing atop the calm waters of the Taku River.
Savor a feast of fresh Wild Alaskan Salmon and scrumptious side dishes overlooking the glaciers.

commerceProducts.title: Destination Highlight: A Misty Fjords Flightseeing
commerceProducts.description: Experience a bird's-eye view of awe-inspiring Misty Fjords National Monument on a floatplane flightseeing tour that soars above this unbridled terrain. You’ll lift off from a calm body of water and listen to commentary from an expert guide using the plane's headsets. Every guest is guaranteed a window seat, so you won't miss a thing. Look out onto a landscape of cascading waterfalls, alpine lakes, dense forests, snow-capped peaks, and 3,000-foot granite cliffs. For the best possible experience, your flight route is dependent on the day's weather. You may see New Eddystone Rock and Big Goat Lake to the South or Neets Bay and Bell Island Hot Springs to the North. Soar above some of Alaska's most rugged and beautiful territory on this high-flying exploration. You will take off on the water, enjoy a picture perfect 60-minute flight, and return with a water landing.
highlights: Board an Alaskan floatplane for the ride of your life.
Explore the stunning Misty Fjords National Monument.
Get a bird's-eye-view of the awe-inspiring natural landscape.

commerceProducts.title: Destination Highlight: Butchart and Butterfly Gardens
commerceProducts.description: Spend your day surrounded by vivid and vibrant color with a tour to two of Victoria’s most popular attractions; Butchart and Butterfly Gardens. Meander along trails that lead you through an incredible 55-acres of landscaped perfection at Butchart Gardens. See the Rose Gardens, Italian Gardens, Japanese Gardens and legendary Sunken Gardens. Stroll beneath flittering wings of color at Butterfly Garden. You’ll see pink flamingoes and tropical birds, as well. You might even see a butterfly sleeping! This tour is provided by an operator that has been third-party certified to meet the Global Sustainable Tourism Council's Criteria for Tour Operators.
highlights: Explore one of the world's foremost botanical gardens on a self-guided tour.
Visit the famous Sunken Garden, an abandoned limestone quarry that was magically transformed into a masterpiece.
Explore the 12,000-square-foot Butterfly Garden and wander among a multitude of free-flying butterflies.

activityLevel.description: This tour is not recommended for guests with pre-existing medical conditions such as cardiac, respiratory, or orthopedic conditions, including joint injuries or disease, or any other serious medical condition. Guests must consider their physical fitness level and medical history when determining whether this tour is appropriate. Guests who have concerns must consult with their personal physician before engaging in any activity that may be strenuous for them, particularly those involving water-based activities. Guests should consider their swimming ability when selecting tours involving water-based activities.
activityLevel.name: Strenuous

commerceProducts.title: Destination Highlight: UTV Safari, Cruise, Craft Beer and Dungeness Crab Meal

promotion.title: CEL Shorex Evergreen Destination Highlights 60-79% booked

commerceProducts.description: Rev things up as you jump behind the wheel of a UTV on a thrilling, off-road safari through Alaska’s pristine scenery, followed by a scenic boat ride to George Inlet Lodge for a decadent crab lunch and craft beer tasting.
highlights: Take in the vibrant, small-town scenery and rich history of frontier town Ketchikan on your way to the UTV Base Camp.

Hop aboard your UTV and zoom out through the mountainous scenery of George Inlet Fjords, up old logging roads and across jaw-dropping bridges while marveling at the magnificent scenery of Mahoney Glacial Cirque.
Next, board a 46-foot, enclosed catamaran sightseeing vessel for a scenic seven-mile ride along the coast, with the Mahoney Glacial Cirque prominent miles below the trails you were just driving on.
Take pictures of the old gold mine and historic George Inlet Cannery, and keep your eyes opened for Alaska's vaunted wildlife, especially eagles.

Arrive to George Inlet Lodge to sample five craft beers from three two local breweries paired with crab chowder, smoked salmon dip, steaming hot Dungeness crab, and a delicious blueberry cheesecake with blueberry toppings dessert.
Relax amid the rustic charm and the Alaskan hospitality of the lodge while enjoying this true Alaskan experience before your return to the port.

commerceProducts.title: Small Group: Skagway Glacier Discovery by Helicopter
commerceProducts.description: Leave civilization behind as you embark on an unforgettable journey to Alaska's remote glaciers. Begin your adventure at the historic Skagway waterfront, where you'll be outfitted with overboots before boarding a helicopter. Once you lift off, the magic begins. Fly across regal mountains, majestic valleys and colossal glaciers before landing on a magnificent glacier. Once you land, you'll have the opportunity to explore one of nature's greatest marvels on foot.
highlights: Experience what it feels like to stand on a glacier and walk across a river of ice.
Enjoy a bird's-eye-view of Skagway's breathtaking landscape as your helicopter soars through the sky.
See Mother Nature's best creations including the Chilkat Glacier, Ferebee Glacier,  or Meade Glacier.

commerceProducts.title: Small Group: Adventure Kart Expedition
commerceProducts.description: Feel the rush of driving your own custom-designed Polaris RZR 1000  Kart on a private road that will take you deep into Ketchikan’s breathtaking wilderness.
highlights: Drive your own specially-designed adventure kart and get your adrenaline pumping.
Learn about the history, culture, and economy of Ketchikan as you are transported first by motor coach to the rainforest wilderness and the Adventure Kart base camp.

Listen to a safety briefing and gear up in preparation for your exciting, one-and-a-half-hour guided trek. The caravan of karts sets off to explore the remote backcountry along several miles of improved forest trail, with your guide in the lead ATV.
Feel the rush of adrenaline at the start of your journey in a custom designed Polaris RZR 1000  that tests your ability to traverse through the wilderness.

A comfortable pace is maintained as you thread your way around steep curves. The road climbs to reveal unparalleled views of the Tongass National Forest, Behm Canal and Alaska's fabled Inside Passage.
You'll stop along the way to soak up the grandeur and beauty of this lush land. Drivers and passengers will have the opportunity to switch positions for the return trip.
Watch out for wildlife along the way.
Bandanas and Gloves are available for purchase.

commerceProducts.title: Small Group: Exclusive Flightseeing and Taste of Alaska

promotion.title: CEL Shorex Evergreen Destination Highlights 60-79% booked

commerceProducts.description: Indulge in the perfect blend of Ketchikan's finest offerings, as you embark on an unforgettable journey combining spectacular scenery and mountain top flightseeing with a luxurious and authentic Alaskan seafood feast at a secluded world-famous George Inlet Lodge.
highlights: Discover firsthand why Alaska is affectionately known as “The Last Frontier." This extraordinary excursion promises a once-in-a-lifetime experience that will undoubtedly be the highlight of your Alaskan getaway.
Feel the exhilaration as a DeHavilland Beaver aircraft roars to life, with your skilled pilot at the helm, as you ascend from the sparkling ocean below.
Enjoy your pilot’s narration and details of the area with individual headsets and a guaranteed window seat.
Glide gently over the Tongass Narrows, taking in the bustling communities below and marveling at the awe-inspiring mountain ranges that define this remarkable corner of the world.

Your flight to George Inlet Lodge will transport you over rugged peaks at the southern tip of Revillagigedo Island. En route, keen observers might spot mountain goats resting on pristine snowpack or black bears foraging for succulent berries, or humpback whales breaching in the ocean.

As your floatplane gracefully touches down on the tranquil waters of George Inlet, you will arrive at the lodge where your host welcomes you. Have your cameras ready to capture the breathtaking sight of your floatplane taking off, framed by the magnificent Tongass National Forest.

Indulge in a mouthwatering Alaskan Tasting Adventure featuring your choice of three craft beers or Ciders from renowned Alaska breweries and Cidery, each carefully paired with a selection of delectable dishes.

Start with our homemade George Inlet Lodge crab chowder (or opt for a fresh salad with an Asian-style dressing). Savor the flavors of our fresh crab egg rolls and a crab cake made according to our lodge recipe, followed by a half steaming hot Dungeness crab, cooked to perfection.

Conclude your meal with a delightful piece of blueberry-topped cheesecake, a perfect blend of sweetness and tartness. As you savor each bite, you'll be entertained with a lesson in the art of crab cracking, hear entertaining stories about Alaskan Fishing and Crabbing as well as a brief history of the lodge.

Conclude your tour experience with a beautiful 25-minute coastal drive that provides a glimpse into our vibrant waterfront community and its local history, charming harbors, fascinating totem parks, and the authentic Alaskan way of life.

commerceProducts.title: Destination Highlight: Butchart Gardens and Taste of Tim Hortons
commerceProducts.description: Discover the natural splendor and historic charm of Canada, as you stop by the country’s iconic coffeehouse, followed by a visit to the Butchart Gardens - an enchanting masterpiece of colors, fragrances and floral displays.
highlights: Board your air-conditioned motor coach and set off on your picturesque Canadian journey, as your knowledgeable driver regales you with insightful commentary along the way. Make a brief stop at the iconic Tim Hortons, a beloved coffee and donut shop, where you can indulge in a couple of treats from this local favorite.
After, a scenic drive brings you to Butchart Gardens, a once barren space transformed into a 55-acre, century-old haven of beauty, adorned with lush greens and vibrant blooms.
Here, enjoy free time to explore at your own pace, as you stroll through the manicured pathways and admire the delicate details of each display.
Immerse yourself in the tranquility of these ethereal landscapes, before pausing at the garden’s gift shop for an unforgettable souvenir and departing with a complimentary memento (a Canada magnet).
As you return to your awaiting ship, pass by the highlights of downtown Victoria, including the Parliament Building, the Fairmont Empress Hotel and the sparkling waters of the city’s inner harbor.

commerceProducts.title: Small Group: Luxury Whale Watch

promotion.title: CEL Shorex Evergreen Destination Highlights 60-79% booked

commerceProducts.description: Take the trip of a lifetime on an exclusive, luxury whale watching experience where you're one of only eight guests onboard an exclusive luxury yacht led by an experienced naturalist and professional captain that offers premium Alaskan refreshments as you scan the beautiful ocean wilderness for the spectacular leviathans that call it home.
highlights: Meet your Mercedes Sprinter "land yacht" at the pier for a scenic, 25-minute drive to Auke Bay.

Board Alaska's only whale-watching yachts to set out on your adventure in style, including local appetizers and drinks, including Alaskan Brewery beer, wine, Champagne, soft drinks, coffee, and a scrumptious charcuterie board or breakfast board for morning trips.

Cast your eyes to the gorgeous and frigid waters during one of Alaska's best whale watching experiences to look for massive humpback whales thriving in their summer habitat. Orcas, bald eagles, harbor seals, sea lions, and porpoises join the list of amazing creatures you may see on your trip
Full cabin controlled heater or air conditioner can be turned on at customer’s request.

source.altText: the White Pass Railway with snowy mountains.
Madam teaching the street strut dance to guests.

commerceProducts.title: Destination Highlight: Best of Skagway
commerceProducts.description:
Experience many of Skagway's highlights in one tour. First, climb aboard the White Pass and Yukon Railway and ascend into the scenic mountains, hearing stories of the miners who made this difficult, or once-treacherous, sojourn on foot more than a century ago. Arriving in Fraser, British Columbia board a motor coach to travel south through the pass where your driver/guide will point out sites including Tormented Valley and Pitchfork Falls. At the foot of the pass is Liarsville Gold Rush Trail Camp. Here a cast of sourdoughs and dance hall girls will entertain you with a humorous melodrama, recite a poem by the "Bard of the North" and teach you the art of finding gold! You are guaranteed to hit pay dirt and you get to keep the gold you find... and there is nothing like panning for gold to work up an appetite! At the Liarsville Cookhouse the grill is fired up for a delicious feast of wild Alaskan salmon, baked chicken, rice pilaf, a variety of salads, baked beans, cornbread and dessert. 
Your tour culminates at the world-famous Red Onion Saloon where you will be greeted by sumptuously dressed madams. Upstairs in the Bombay room, enjoy a champagne toast to the courageous ladies of 1898. A few more steps takes you to what was the most luxurious brothel of its day, now faithfully restored to its present glory. On your tour through the brothel museum, you will hear stories of the infamous madams who worked there, and see the prized silver dress and other artifacts left behind by the "soiled doves". Embrace the spirit of '98 and enjoy the experience of a lifetime!
highlights: Travel the White Pass and Yukon Railway, following the footsteps of miners who travelled into the mountains on foot.
Discover the incredible beauty of British Columbia's Tormented Valley and Pitchfork Falls.
Sip a glass of champagne at the famous Red Onion Saloon.
Savor a delicious meal of wild Alaskan salmon, baked chicken, rice pilaf, salads, baked beans, cornbread, and dessert.
Immerse yourself in gold rush life at the Gold Rush Trail Camp where you'll learn how to pan for gold.
